Leaderboard v4 NEW Compare LLMs How it works About Contribute Audit GitHub ↗

Score-file audit

Read-only render of the latest DR_SCORE_AUDIT_*.md in data/results/audit/. Lists which agents were excluded from Elo and why — runner placeholders, infra failures, judge-error storms.

Leaderboard Method Audit v4
DR_SCORE_AUDIT_2026-05-09.md
updated 2026-05-09 15:07:24

Deep-Research score audit (2026-05-09)

Source directory: data\results\deep_v3 (rank order from leaderboard: camel-ai, flowsearcher-ds, smolagents, ldr, gpt-researcher, deerflow, ii-researcher, langchain-odr, storm)

Summary

  • Total score files: 344
  • Kept after degenerate filter: 283
  • Dropped: 61
  • Agents in Elo: camel-ai, deerflow, flowsearcher-ds, gpt-researcher, ii-researcher, langchain-odr, ldr, smolagents, storm
  • Agents excluded: qx-agents
  • Verdict: FAIL

Table A: per-agent summary

agent files kept dropped mean v2 median v2 mean v1 mean answer_chars n(reach=0) n(reach=1) n(checklist judge_err) drop reasons

storm 30 17 13 0.000 0.000 0.129 124 30 0 0 13 short, 0 infra, 0 judge_err
qx-agents 30 0 30 — — — 367 30 0 30 30 short, 0 infra, 0 judge_err

DR Deep-Research Arena

Independent leaderboard for open-source deep-research agents. Same tasks, same scoring, public method.

Browse
  • Leaderboard
  • v4 (multi-pillar)
  • Compare LLMs
  • Audit
Method
  • How it works
  • About
  • Reproduce / contribute
Source
  • GitHub repository ↗
  • leaderboard.json
composite_v2 = reachability · qm · nli · (0.4 url + 0.4 judge + 0.2 spec) · Sandbox: Magento + Postmill + Kiwix · Bradley-Terry Elo · bootstrap N=1000
